name: autopilot-loop
description: Reusable Codex plugin and CLI for autonomous scratchwork iteration loops.

scripts.smoke: node scripts/autopilot-loop.mjs init --goal "Smoke test loop" --dir /tmp/autopilot-loop-smoke --force && node scripts/autopilot-loop.mjs score --dir /tmp/autopilot-loop-smoke && node scripts/autopilot-loop.mjs report --dir /tmp/autopilot-loop-smoke --summary "Smoke report"

author: neonwatty
